issues.title: The SimpleLoggerAdvisor and the custom advisor have failed.

comments.body: If you wish to use `SimpleLoggerAdvisor`, you will need to adjust the project's logging level to `debug`.

> If you wish to use `SimpleLoggerAdvisor`, you will need to adjust the project's logging level to `debug`.

Thank you for your response, but it's not for this reason. I have already resolved it.
1. There was no problem with the `call` method, but the `stream` method requires using http for the request. I suspect this is due to `WebFlux`.
2. In the custom Advisor, I set the 'order' value. I wanted it to be the last to print the request prompt, so I set it to `Integer.MAX_VALUE`, but it didn't work. Later, I restored it to 0 and found that it could work. Then I switched to `LOWEST_PRECEDENCE - 1` and found that both would work. Maybe the documentation is incorrect or there is a bug.
